name: docjacket
description: Connect your DocJacket transactions, tasks, deadlines, and Prepared Work to Codex. Triage your pipeline in one prompt.
starterPrompts: Use DocJacket to summarize my active transactions.
Use DocJacket to find transactions that need attention today.
Use DocJacket to list deadlines this week.
Use DocJacket to show open tasks on the [property] deal.
Use DocJacket to look up the listing agent on [property].
